---
nocite: |
  @rowe2020
  @fotheringham1989spatial
  @lovelace2019
  @bivand2013
  @arribas2014spatial
  @comber2015
  @anselin1988spatial
  @onnerfors2019eurostat
  @tao2018
  @kwan2004geovisualization
  @kong2018
  @openshaw1981modifiable
  @fotheringham1991modifiable
  @casado-díaz2017
  @arribas-bel2021
  @singleton2013
  @patias2019
  @robinson1950ecological
---

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
